title: Allow for rand fields in base classes

features.name: rand field in base class with class inheritance
features.description: Code should include a class that extends another class which contains a rand field

features.name: self-referential class field causing infinite loop
features.description: Code should include a class that has a field of its own base class type, creating a recursive type definition

features.name: rand field of same class type
features.description: Code should include a class that has a rand field of its own type
